name: pi-mermaid
description: Pi extension that renders ```mermaid fences as Unicode box-drawing diagrams, powered by xai-org/grok-build's terminal Mermaid renderer compiled to WASM.

scripts.build:wasm: cd rust && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && node -e "const z=require('zlib'),fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('../pi-mermaid.wasm.br',z.brotliCompressSync(fs.readFileSync('target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pi_mermaid_wasm.wasm'),{params:{[z.constants.BROTLI_PARAM_QUALITY]:11}}))"
